reviews.comment:
Faltarían mas surtidores. Se tarda mucho tiempo en poder cargar combustible, el aparato para inflar las ruedas siempre esta descompuesto. La atención es buena

(Translated by Google)
More pumps are needed. It takes a long time to fill up, and the tire inflator is always out of order. The service is good.

reviews.comment:
Cordial atención del personal Siempre que he viajado a  Cafayate, Salta..Los aseos en perfectas condiciones. Tienen un bar muy completo. En la playa, en ocasiones hay muchos vehículos para cargar combustible lo que genera largas filas y de igual manera todos ellos no paran en atender a uno y otro cliente. Gracias Cafayate!

(Translated by Google)
Friendly service from the staff. Every time I've traveled to Cafayate, Salta, the restrooms are in perfect condition. They have a very well-stocked bar. On the beach, there are sometimes many vehicles waiting to refuel, which creates long lines, and they all don't stop to serve each customer. Thank you, Cafayate!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcmFTM1F3EAE
